PL control register block

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x0
Size:
0x6c
Source:
pl_control.rdl

Description

Local PS-to-PL control and status register block. Offsets are relative to the 4 KiB control aperture assigned by Vivado.

Contents

Offset Identifier Name
0x00 ID ID
0x04 VERSION VERSION
0x08 CONTROL CONTROL
0x0C STATUS STATUS
0x10 PIN_OUT PIN_OUT
0x14 COUNTER COUNTER
0x18 FRAME_CAPACITY FRAME_CAPACITY
0x1C - -
0x20 FRAME_COMMIT FRAME_COMMIT
0x24 FRAME_COUNT FRAME_COUNT
0x28 COMMITTED_WORDS COMMITTED_WORDS
0x2C FIRST_FRAME_WORD FIRST_FRAME_WORD
0x30 LAST_FRAME_WORD LAST_FRAME_WORD
0x34 ERROR_COUNT ERROR_COUNT
0x38 FRAME_BANK_WORDS FRAME_BANK_WORDS
0x3C ACTIVE_BANK ACTIVE_BANK
0x40 WRITE_BANK WRITE_BANK
0x44 FRAME_SEQUENCE FRAME_SEQUENCE
0x48 CONSUMER_CONTROL CONSUMER_CONTROL
0x4C CONSUMER_STATUS CONSUMER_STATUS
0x50 CONSUMER_SEQUENCE CONSUMER_SEQUENCE
0x54 CONSUMER_FRAME_COUNT CONSUMER_FRAME_COUNT
0x58 CONSUMER_ERROR_COUNT CONSUMER_ERROR_COUNT
0x5C WS281X_BIT_RATE WS281X_BIT_RATE
0x60 WS281X_OUTPUT_COUNT WS281X_OUTPUT_COUNT
0x64 WS281X_PIXELS_PER_OUTPUT WS281X_PIXELS_PER_OUTPUT
0x68 CONSUMER_DEBUG CONSUMER_DEBUG
